<analysis based on the previous output><analysis>
Training completed. The full (unquantized) model achieved 0.5754 accuracy on the test set, which is below the 0.62 target. Quantization is now in progress, but quantization typically does not significantly improve accuracy (it may slightly decrease it). I will likely need to retrain with better hyperparameters after seeing the quantized result. Key improvements could include more epochs, adjusted learning rate, wordNgrams=3, and possibly different loss function.
</analysis>
<plan>
I will wait for the quantization to finish and see the final quantized accuracy and model size. If accuracy is still below 0.62, I will retrain with improved hyperparameters (more epochs, wordNgrams=3, potentially higher dim or different lr).
</plan>
